## How to Test

1. `cd vue-app && npm install`
2. `npm run quick` (starts mock backend + dev server)
3. Open http://localhost:8080
4. <!-- Describe what to verify -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes in `vue-app/`
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds in `vue-app/`
- [ ] Tested in the browser with `npm run quick`
- [ ] If a new entity was added: model, types, mutation-types, Vuex module, composable, views, route, nav link, and API functions are all present
- [ ] If a route was added: `router.ts` and `nav-bar.vue` both updated
- [ ] If an env variable was added: `.env`, `.env.development`, and `store/config.ts` updated
